description: M-sized feature: add discount calculation with tiered pricing rules to existing service
code_snippet:
// Tiered discount: 0-100 → 0%, 100-500 → 5%, 500-1000 → 10%, >1000 → 15%
func (s *PricingService) CalcDiscount(ctx context.Context, order *Order) (int64, error)

expected_tdd_phases.red: Inside-Out: service test first with boundary values at each tier edge
expected_tdd_phases.green: Implement tiered logic with guard clauses
expected_tdd_phases.refactor: Extract tier lookup table, simplify conditionals

expected_killer_hypothesis: boundary amount 500 gets 5% instead of 10% due to < vs <= comparison
